title: Sumerian/Akkadian: The Cursing of Akkad (Full)
description: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Cursing of Akkad (Full).
introduction: From the Sumerian/Akkadian corpus: The Cursing of Akkad (Full).

translation.text: From 'The Cursing of Akkad (Full)': One of the 117 major literary works of ancient Mesopotamia, recorded on clay tablets in cuneiform script and preserved in the great libraries of Sumer, Akkad, Babylon, and Assyria.
